properties.location: 1 NNW EASTERN IOWA AIRP, LINN Co, IA
properties.remarks: A BRIEF TORNADO MOVED THROUGH CROPLAND JUST NORTH OF THE EASTERN IOWA AIRPORT. THE PATH WAS FOUND IN HIGH RESOLUTION SATELLITE IMAGERY. THE TORNADO WAS ON THE LEADING EDGE OF A LARGER SWATH OF STRAIGHT LINE WINDS THAT SNAPPED TREES AND DESTROYED OUTBUILDINGS AND GRAIN BINS. THE TORNADO WAS ON THE GROUND FOR ABOUT ONE MINUTE, TRAVELED JUST UNDER ONE MILE, AND HAD A MAXIMUM WIDTH OF ABOUT 40 YARDS. THERE WAS NO DAMAGE DIRECTLY ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE TORNADO FROM WHICH AN EF-SCALE RATING COULD BE ASSIGNED. THUS, THE TORNADO IS DESIGNATED EF-U.
